# nxos_acl_log (Resource)

This resource can manage the ACL logging configuration on NX-OS devices, including the match log level severity, log update interval, and detailed/MAC/SGT/threshold logging options.

### API Documentation

- [acllogLogCache](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Security and Policing/acllog:LogCache/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nxos_acl_log" "example" {
  detailed        = true
  entries         = 8000
  include_mac     = true
  include_sgt     = true
  interval        = 300
  match_log_level = 3
  threshold       = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `detailed` (Boolean) Include detailed ACL information.
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `entries` (Number) Maximum number of flows to be monitored by logging process.
  - Range: `0`-`1048576`
- `include_mac` (Boolean) Include Mac info in syslogs.
- `include_sgt` (Boolean) Include source group tag info in syslogs.
- `interval` (Number) Log update interval in seconds.
  - Range: `5`-`86400`
- `match_log_level` (Number) Acllog logging level severity.
  - Range: `0`-`7`
- `threshold` (Number) Number of packets are logged before the expiry of the alert interval the system generates a Syslog message.
  - Range: `0`-`1000000`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to       = nxos_acl_log.example
  identity = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema


#### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = nxos_acl_log.example
  id = ""
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nxos_acl_log.example ""
```
